name: perfume-miniapp-production-admin
description: Perfume storefront, production backend and separate admin panel

scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install && npm --prefix admin install
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev" "npm --prefix admin run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix frontend run build && npm --prefix admin run build
scripts.check: npm --prefix backend run check && npm run build
